nasb.text: Will you still say, “I am a god,” In the presence of your slayer, Though you are a man and not God, In the hands of those who wound you?

esv.text: Will you still say, ‘I am a god,’ in the presence of those who kill you, though you are but a man, and no god, in the hands of those who slay you?

cnv.text: 在殺戮你的人面前， 你還能說“我是神”嗎？ 在那些殺害你的人手裡， 你不過是人，並不是神。

ccb.text: 在杀戮你的人面前， 你还能自称为神吗？ 在杀你的人手中， 你不过是人，不是神。
